name: Datadog API V2 Collection
description: Datadog is a monitoring and analytics platform for cloud-scale infrastructure, applications, and logs. The API lets you query metrics, manage dashboards, configure alerts, search logs, and automate infrastructure monitoring programmatically.

capabilities.name: fleet_automation
capabilities.description: Manage fleet automation — create a configuration deployment, upgrade hosts, create a schedule. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: actions_datastores
capabilities.description: Manage actions datastores — create datastore, bulk write datastore items, list datastores. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: action_connection
capabilities.description: Manage action connection — create a new action connection, register a new app key, list app key registrations. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: agentless_scanning
capabilities.description: Manage agentless scanning — create aws scan options, create azure scan options, create gcp scan options. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: key_management
capabilities.description: Manage key management — create an api key, create an application key for current user, get all api keys. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: spans_metrics
capabilities.description: Manage spans metrics — create a span-based metric, get all span-based metrics, get a span-based metric. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: apm_retention_filters
capabilities.description: Manage apm retention filters — create a retention filter, re-order retention filters, update a retention filter. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: apm
capabilities.description: Manage apm — get service list. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: app_builder
capabilities.description: Manage app builder — create app, publish app, list apps. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: audit
capabilities.description: Manage audit — search audit logs events, get a list of audit logs events. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: auth_n_mappings
capabilities.description: Manage auth n mappings — create an authn mapping, list all authn mappings, get an authn mapping by uuid. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: case_management
capabilities.description: Manage case management — create a case, create a project, create a notification rule. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
